objects.name: Magical Box of the Champion of Aether

objects.text:
CAST YOUR
INFLUENCE
CAST YOUR
MIGHT

YOU MUST PAY
FOR YOUR
ENTRANCE.

CHOOSE YOUR
DOOR
CHOOSE YOUR
FATE

THIS IS MY
PRISONER. LET
HIM SUFFER.

DONT LET A
CLOSED DOOR
STOP YOU

I AM ALL
I AM NONE

HARD AS ROCKS
BLUE AS SKY
TWINKLE IN
WOMANS EYE

A GOLDEN
HEAD AND TAIL
BUT NO
BODY

I ARCH YET
HAVE NO BACK

THE GRAVE OF
KING FILIUS
EXPLORER OF
COMBINATIONS

I DONT LIKE TO
BE IGNORED

THE GRAVE OF
KING MILIAS
THE GOLDEN
WHO EVEN

IF YOU WANT TO
STAY ALIVE YOU
BETTER TURN
AND RUN

INVOKE FUL
FOR A MAGIC
TORCH

objects.name: Magical Box of the Champion of Aether

objects.text:
WHAT IS UNDER
FOOT IS SOON
OVERHEAD

BEWARE MY
TWISTED HUMOR
THE DECEIVER
THE SNAKE

COWARDS WILL
BE HUNTED DOWN
AND
KILLED

DYOUR NAMES WILL
BE RECORDED IN
THE GREAT HALL
AND REMEMBERED BY
THE FUTURE
GENERATIONS YOU
HAVE MADE
POSSIBLE.

CBY YOUR BRAVE
DEEDS I AM MADE
WHOLE AGAIN AND
HARMONY IS
RESTORED TO THE
WORLD.

BONLY BY LEARNING
THE TRUTH AND
SEEKING THE PATH
OF BALANCE
DID YOU GUESS THE
TRUE NATURE OF
THE FIRESTAFF.

ATHANK YOU MY
FRIENDS.  YOU
HAVE BANISHED
CHAOS AND
REJECTED THE
FALSE PATH OF
UNCOMPROMISING
ORDER.
